channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP, 22–24 June 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
5 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Mediana for POP, 22–24 June 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/slovenian_ep_polls/2026-06-24-Mediana.html
